rulings.Case Title: SHANEL STASZ VS. ESTATE OF HUGO W. QUACKENBUSH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion To Reclassify Case To A Limited Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, June 9, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT MICHAEL EISENBERG Motion to Reclassify Case to a Limited Jurisdiction. Motion granted. Defendant's objections to plaintiff's evidence are sustained. Defendant establishes good cause for not seeking reclassification earlier. No possibility that verdict in plaintiff's favor will exceed $25,000. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE BARBOZA VS. VLADIGOR INVESTMENTS, INC. DBA TOWER CAR WASH et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, June 9, 2010, line 7, DEFENDANT VLADIGOR INVESTMENTS, INC. DBA TOWER CAR WASH DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Is sustained with ten days leave to amend. As to 1st, 2nd, 3rd, and 4th causes of action. Plaintiff to allege that he was otherwise qualified for the job under Scotch vs. Art Institute of CA (2009) 173 Cal.App. 4th 986. As to the 5th cause of action (IIED) plaintiff must plead discriminatory conduct that violates FEHA. As to the 6th cause of action (failure to pay wages) plaintiff must plead in compliance with Oppenheimer vs. Moebius (1957) 151 Cal.App. 2nd 818. As to the 7th cause of action (B&P sec. 17200) plaintiff must plead labor code violation basis. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MR RICKEY LEON SCOTT VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Peititon For Relief From Cliams Presentation Requirement (Govt Code 946.6)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, June 9, 2010, line 8, PLAINTIFF RICKEY SCOTT Notice of Hearing on Peititon for Relief from Cliams Presentation Requirement (Government Code 946.6). Is denied. No evidence presented that plaintiff was physically or mentally incapacitated during the time specified in Government Code section 911.2 and by reason of that disability failed to present a claim during that time. Government Code section 946.6. =(302/CWW)
